text.title: gemini-function-calling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gemini-function-calling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using enable_automatic_function_calling=True in a production agent pipeline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automatic calling executes functions directly in the SDK call. Any exception kills the entire call with no logging, no retry, and no opportunity to validate arguments before execution.

failure-mode.description: Enabling grounding unconditionally for all queries without surfacing the cost to users.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Grounding adds significant per-query cost. Agents that enable it by default without making the cost visible to users can cause budget blowouts.

failure-mode.description: Using the same task_type for both document indexing and query embedding.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Using RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT for queries or RETRIEVAL_QUERY for indexing violates the embedding model's optimization. Retrieval quality degrades measurably, typically 10–20% lower recall.
